server.name: ai-datalake-platform
server.description: MCP Server for AI-Powered Data Lake Platform — enables Claude agents to query datasets, read metadata, check data quality, and trigger pipeline runs

tools.name: query_dataset
tools.description: Execute a SQL query against the data lake. Supports querying Bronze, Silver, and Gold layer tables via Amazon Athena.

limit.description: Maximum number of rows to return

tools.name: get_schema
tools.description: Retrieve the schema definition for a table in the data lake, including column names, types, descriptions, and partition information.

tools.name: check_quality
tools.description: Get data quality metrics for a specific dataset, including completeness, accuracy, consistency, timeliness, and uniqueness scores.

dataset_name.description: Name of the dataset to check

date_range.description: Optional date range for quality check

tools.name: run_pipeline
tools.description: Trigger a pipeline run for a specific layer or the full pipeline. Returns the pipeline execution ID for tracking.

dry_run.description: If true, validates but does not execute

tools.name: generate_insight
tools.description: Generate AI-powered business insights from a Gold layer dataset using Claude Opus.

focus_area.description: Optional area to focus analysis on (e.g., 'revenue trends', 'customer churn')

tools.name: list_datasets
tools.description: List all available datasets in the data lake with their metadata, row counts, and last updated timestamps.

resources.name: Data Catalog
resources.description: Complete catalog of all datasets, tables, and their metadata

resources.name: Table Schema
resources.description: Schema definition for a specific table

resources.name: Quality Report
resources.description: Latest data quality report for a dataset

resources.name: Pipeline Status
resources.description: Current pipeline execution status and history
